ab: a nia kinaizuanan imaza i taitu king taren guan a tjuabar mula.
ch: 我們家住在台東縣達仁鄉土坂村。

en: There are five people in our family.

ab: tiamen taqumaqanan izua ma tjelu a siruvetjek.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: na matevelj amen kata ku kama, kina, tjavulung a kaka uqaljay kata vavayan.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: qaca ku kama, kisace a ku kama.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: kuljay a ku kina. kuisan a ku kina.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: nu i tjumaq amen ti kama lukayan na men ta pinaiwanan.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the paiwan language with us at home.

ab: nu kilavay tua kalja zalangezangan ru vaik amen a sema qinaljan.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: tiaken kata tjavulung a kaka uaqaljay vavayan ru kaciul a djemekep tua ceqel.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: tjengelay a ken tua u taqumaqanan.
en: I like our family very much.
